    • Method Detail

      • toByteArray

      • getDescriptorGenerator

        DescriptorGenerator<? extends ShapeDescriptor> getDescriptorGenerator()
        Description copied from interface: Descriptor
        Get associated DescriptorGenerator. This method is intended to use only for ensuring that two compared descriptors has the same associated generator instances.

        Note that it is usually a non recommended practice to use this method to access the associated generator to perform further operations on it.

        Specified by:
        getDescriptorGenerator in interface Descriptor
        Returns:
        The associated descriptor generator
